companyParagraphs.four: We uphold a quality philosophy centered on wear resistance. Through digital production scheduling and multi-stage quality control, every screen we deliver is built to last in high-impact, high-abrasion environments.
companyParagraphs.one: Huayun Wire Mesh specializes in manufacturing and developing mining screens and heavy-duty industrial mesh. With industry-leading automated slot-welding lines and dedicated 65Mn spring steel weaving equipment, we reliably produce ultra-heavy screens with wire diameters up to 14 mm.
companyParagraphs.three: Beyond standard specifications, Huayun serves mining equipment suppliers and large-scale coal washing and mineral processing operations, offering material recommendations based on wear analysis and non-standard custom fabrication.
companyParagraphs.two: Our factory is located in Binzhou, Shandong Province, with a production floor of 15,000 m². We have established a complete quality chain from raw material analysis and weaving/welding process control through to finished product load simulation testing.

aboutPage.ctaDescription: Share your application, order volume, and customization requirements — we'll arrange a business and technical consultation promptly.
aboutPage.ctaTitle: Want to learn more about our factory capabilities?

customCapabilities.one: Production from customer drawings or samples, with processing tailored by aperture, wire diameter, dimensions, and frame structure.
customCapabilities.three: For corrosive, abrasive, high-temperature, and other special conditions, we assist in selecting stainless steel, high-manganese steel, and composite materials.
customCapabilities.two: Standard specifications are quickly matched to stock or standard production parameters, reducing back-and-forth communication.

deliveryCapabilities.one: Standard specifications ship from stock; urgent orders are prioritized in production scheduling and dispatch.
deliveryCapabilities.three: LTL, full truckload, and international freight available, with wooden crates, pallets, and protective packaging.
deliveryCapabilities.two: Custom products are scheduled by processing complexity with clear delivery milestones — no vague commitments.

aboutPage.description: Focused on mining screen manufacturing and high-abrasion custom solutions, serving mining, coal washing, aggregate grading, and industrial fine screening.

applicationDetail.ctaTitle: Need a tailored solution for this application?
applicationDetail.emptyProductsDescription: Product recommendations for this application are not yet complete. Contact us directly for manual selection assistance.
applicationDetail.notFoundDescription: This application scene no longer exists or has been removed. Return to the list to explore other solutions.

filtration.one: Filtration precision, pressure drop, and cleaning frequency are interdependent — the wrong material choice leads to problems fast.
filtration.three: Customers often have end-use goals but lack drawings, leaving selection information incomplete upfront.
filtration.two: Many process media are corrosive or temperature-sensitive — material compatibility must be confirmed first.

grain.one: Customers typically describe grain type and contaminants but can't specify which mesh structure to use.
grain.three: Equipment models and mounting dimensions vary — standard sizes don't always fit directly.
grain.two: Balancing screening efficiency against grain breakage and mesh blinding makes parameter selection tricky.

mining.one: Both impact and abrasion are severe — short service life usually means mismatched selection or structure, not poor product quality.
mining.three: Replacement downtime is costly — spare part lead times and wear life must be factored in from the start.
mining.two: When tensioning method, aperture, and particle size are mismatched, throughput drops immediately.

boundary.one: Knowledge base content helps you understand screen specifications, material differences, common operating conditions, and calculation methods. It does not replace on-site trial screening, third-party testing, or full system validation.
boundary.three: Service life, throughput, open area, and material recommendations are all affected by on-site conditions. Empirical values on this site are a starting point only.
boundary.two: For food, pharmaceutical, highly corrosive, high-temperature/pressure, or regulated certification applications, final selection must be confirmed against actual media, compliance requirements, and project drawings.

contentStandardsPage.ctaDescription: Each article displays sources, review team, last review date, and scope limitations at the top. If you find unclear descriptions or questionable parameters, contact us and we'll review manually.
contentStandardsPage.ctaTitle: Want to verify an article's sources and last update?
contentStandardsPage.description: This page explains who writes and reviews Huayun's knowledge base content, what sources are used, when updates happen, and how errors are handled — establishing a clear chain of credibility.

roles.publisherDescription: Articles are only published once source documentation, review information, and scope limitations are complete.
roles.reviewerDescription: Key parameters, material descriptions, applicable conditions, calculation logic, and risk boundaries are reviewed by the Huayun Technical & Quality Control Joint Review team.
roles.writerDescription: Content editors compile common customer questions, product specification language, and page structure — turning technical information into clear, readable content.

seo.description: Explains author roles, review mechanisms, source policies, update rules, and error correction procedures for the Huayun knowledge base.
seo.title: Content Review & Editorial Standards

sourcePolicy.four: AI tools may assist with drafting, but content involving specifications, formulas, material recommendations, or applicable conclusions must pass human review before publication.
sourcePolicy.one: Primary sources are prioritized: national standards, industry standards, test specifications, equipment datasheets, and raw material spec sheets.
sourcePolicy.three: Source citations include both the publisher and intended use, so readers can judge whether a reference defines a term, verifies a parameter, or establishes a boundary.
sourcePolicy.two: Material selection, service life judgments, and condition guidance draw on internal production and QC experience — but individual cases are never generalized into universal conclusions.

contentStandardsPage.title: Content Review & Editorial Standards

clearBoundary.description: Every article states applicable and non-applicable scenarios, preventing experiential judgments from being presented as absolute conclusions.
clearBoundary.title: Clear Boundaries

correctionTrigger.description: If you find issues with parameters, descriptions, or conclusions, submit feedback directly — the content will enter a manual review process.
correctionTrigger.title: Error Correction Enabled

namedReview.description: Knowledge base articles display the author, review team, and last review date — no anonymous technical conclusions.
namedReview.title: Named Review

traceableSources.description: Content involving standards, materials, calculations, and condition assessments clearly displays references and their intended use.
traceableSources.title: Traceable Sources

updateRules.four: If a conclusion applies only to specific conditions, it is stated directly in Scope & Limitations — not buried in footnotes.
updateRules.one: The 'Last Reviewed' date on each article represents the most recent date a human reviewer approved the content.
updateRules.three: If feedback identifies ambiguity, missing boundaries, or inaccurate examples, the content re-enters the review process for reconfirmation.
updateRules.two: Content with standard updates, specification changes, calculation logic issues, or clear factual errors is prioritized for correction — no delays.

step1.description: Drafts are compiled from frequent customer questions, specification explanations, and common selection mistakes — with a clear problem statement established first.
step1.title: Topic Selection & Draft

step2.description: Standard clauses, product parameters, calculation formulas, and operating condition descriptions are verified item by item, with sources and intended use documented.
step2.title: Source Verification

step3.description: Technical and QC teams jointly review key parameters, applicable boundaries, tolerance ranges, and exclusions — preventing marketing language from overriding technical facts.
step3.title: Technical Review

step4.description: The last reviewed date is recorded at publication. When standards, specifications, or condition conclusions change, the content is re-reviewed and updated.
step4.title: Publication & Re-review

toolsPage.description: Based on ASTM E11 / ISO 9044 standards — precise conversion of mesh size, aperture, wire diameter, and open area to support engineering selection.

features.reference: ASTM E11 Standard Mesh Reference Table

formulas.apertureDescription: W = Aperture (mm), M = Mesh, d = Wire dia. (mm)
formulas.openingAreaDescription: OA = Open area (%), W = Aperture, d = Wire dia.

howTo.description: Enter mesh size, aperture, or wire diameter to instantly calculate open area, pitch, and ASTM E11 reference values.

step1.text: Enter any known value — mesh, aperture, or wire diameter — and the tool calculates the rest automatically.
step1.title: Enter Known Parameters

step2.text: Read open area and pitch results to evaluate screening efficiency, strength, and blinding resistance.
step2.title: Read Conversion Results

step3.text: Click any row in the ASTM E11 reference table to load standard values into the calculator for quick comparison.
step3.title: Check Against Standard Reference

step4.text: Combine the corrosion resistance reference and quick selection guide to choose the most suitable screen material and product type.
step4.title: Apply to Application Selection

howTo.supply: Screen mesh size, aperture, or wire diameter
howTo.title: How to Use the Wire Mesh Technical Calculator for Screen Parameter Conversion

materialGuide.65mn: High hardness, abrasion-resistant; not corrosion-resistant — dry applications only
materialGuide.carbonSteel: Low cost; suitable for slight moisture; not resistant to acids or alkalis
materialGuide.polyurethane: Water and oil resistant; Shore A 65–90 adjustable; low noise
materialGuide.sus304: General-purpose stainless steel; resistant to most chemicals; best value
materialGuide.sus316l: Contains 2–3% molybdenum; chloride-resistant; suitable for seawater, acid, and pharmaceutical applications
